case_title: CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO VS DAWSON, DERICK

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,417.30 FILED BY CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO OFFICE OF THE TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR AS TO DEFENDANT DAWSON, DERICK ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-23-2001 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
